name: profile precedence: exclude_sources removes entire source-file from active rule set
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/resolve.sh" profile.yaml | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);if(!r.rules["g-react-001"]){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: react rules should be excluded\n");process.exit(1)}});'
